title: acinos minae
intro: Acinos minae, also known as Minutine or Mountain Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acinos minae include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Acinos minae can be consumed as a tea, added to infusions, or used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
